summary: Testing iteration 17: Weapon tab variant functionality (matching Armor tab). All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 15+ frontend UI tests passed. CStone images, variant dropdowns with '(Base)' label, dynamic pricing, LOOT ONLY labels, Buy/Loot sections all working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected (same as iteration 16)

critical_code_review_comments: WeaponCard component correctly uses variant_images and variant_data for dynamic updates
GearDetailModal hasVariantData boolean (isArmor || isWeapon) correctly handles both armor and weapon variants
get_weapon_variant_images() correctly returns CStone image URLs for each variant
get_weapon_variant_data() correctly returns price_auec, locations, loot_locations, sold per variant
Loot-only variants (sold=false) correctly show 'LOOT ONLY' in red with loot_locations
Variant buttons in modal show '*' for unique images and '⚠' for loot-only variants
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - CStone API provides variant images and data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 completed Weapons tab to match Armor tab functionality. All 3 Gear tabs (FPS Weapons: 50 items, Armor Sets: 28 items, Equipment: 30 items) fully functional with CStone images, variant dropdowns with '(Base)' label, dynamic pricing, LOOT ONLY indicators, and Buy/Loot location sections. GearDetailModal handles both armor and weapon variants via hasVariantData boolean. Test user: e1agent/test123.
